title: Changes to list of certain non-prescription drugs for distribution as samples (List D): Notice of modification - Canada.ca
content:
## Changes made to List of Certain Non-prescription Drugs for Distribution as Samples (List D): Notice
Date: November  16 , 2022
The Natural and Non-prescription Health ProductsDirectorate  (NNHPD) has amended List D: List of  Certain Non-prescription Drugs for Distribution as Samples . This change takes effect on November 16, 2022.
Health Canada informed the public and stakeholders that we  intended to modify List D through a notice of proposal on August 11, 2020.  After a 60-day comment period, we reviewed all comments received.
Within the product classes set out in the Canada-United  States-Mexico Agreement, Health Canada has expanded List D. The list now  includes all approved ingredients, quantities and uses or purposes, with the  exception of medicated skin care products.
The following product classes are covered:
- diaper-rash products
- anti-dandruff products
- acne therapy products
- athlete's foot products
- anti-septic skin cleansers
- medicated skin care products
Health Canada is now updating the following guidance  document:
- Distributing samples of prescription drugs,  non-prescription drugs and natural health products
Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate 250 Lanark Ave Address Locator 2002B Ottawa ON  K1A 0K9 Email: hc.nnhpd.consultation-dpsnso.sc@canada.ca
